kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Veerapat' into text field '//input[@placeholder="กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล"]'.
kw.arg: //input[@placeholder="กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'asdfjkl;123' into text field '//input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่าน"]'.
kw.arg: //input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่าน"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.scrollBy(0,150) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=(//button[normalize-space()="รีวิวผู้ขับ"])[2]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[normalize-space()="ส่งรีวิว"]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),"รีวิวสำเร็จ")]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

test.name: UAT-017 Passenger Do not Give a Star

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Veerapat' into text field '//input[@placeholder="กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล"]'.
kw.arg: //input[@placeholder="กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'asdfjkl;123' into text field '//input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่าน"]'.
kw.arg: //input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่าน"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.scrollBy(0,200) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=(//button[normalize-space()="รีวิวผู้ขับ"])[4]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[normalize-space()="ส่งรีวิว"]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),"กรุณาให้คะแนนก่อน")]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
